title: Mailchimp vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and AWeber email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which tool suits your needs.
intro: Both Mailchimp and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering free tiers and affordable paid plans. This comparison helps you understand the key differences between these two popular tools so you can choose the best fit for your business needs.
choose_a_if: You need advanced automation and marketing workflows
You plan to build landing pages as part of your campaigns
You want extensive A/B testing and audience segmentation capabilities
choose_b_if: You value simplicity and ease of use over complex features
You publish content regularly and want RSS-to-email functionality
You prioritize strong customer support and user satisfaction ratings

faq.a: Mailchimp offers more advanced features and automation capabilities, making it better for growth-focused businesses. However, AWeber excels in simplicity and has significantly higher customer satisfaction ratings. The best choice depends on whether you prioritize features or ease of use.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or AWeber?
faq.a: Both platforms offer identical free tiers (up to 500 subscribers). Mailchimp's paid plans start at $13/month while AWeber starts at $15/month, giving Mailchimp a slight pricing advantage. However, both are competitively priced for small businesses and solopreneurs.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list imports and exports. Most migration should be straightforward, though you may need to recreate automation workflows manually. Both companies offer customer support resources to help with the transition process.
